text.title: Frontline Validation Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Process has ≥1 frontline operator role AND duration ≥4 weeks?

branch.when: operator_roles >= 1 AND duration_weeks >= 4 AND access_granted == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full protocol: ≥2 operators × variant, observation-before-interview, closed taxonomy.
Direct observation prohibited; document the restriction and use document-analysis alternatives.
Collapse to standard elicitation; no separate validation gate.
Sequence observation before listening session per same-operator pairing.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
